overview: AI-powered Digital Healthcare Analysis & Tracker with integrated Food Plate Calorie Scanner. Users can photograph meals to instantly see calorie counts and nutrition breakdowns, track daily mood, check symptoms, view health risk scores, and download comprehensive health reports — all in a beautiful ocean-blue card UI.
features: Food Plate Calorie Scanner with AI food detection
Daily calorie tracking with goal progress ring
Mood tracker with weekly trend charts
Symptoms checker with natural remedy suggestions
AI diet recommendations by health condition
Medical disclaimers on all AI result pages
